checkpoint_request.preferred_settlement: record as workpacket/diff ingestion control artifact after content-proof scan is run or explicitly deferred

required_next_action_before_promotion: Run ion_local_workpackets_diffs_ingest.py read-only against ION_CODEX FULL only when authorized.
Settle by B00 through B09 batches.
Do not apply any diff during ingestion.
Do not promote workpacket or diff material to current law without settlement receipt.
integration_with_multi_agent_protocol: Candidate workpackets, diffs, and receipts feed context_settlement/inbox.
Shared context updates are generated only after context settler approval.
C-number assignment is serialized by the context settler.
non_claims: This packet does not prove the local scanner has run.
This packet does not apply or approve any diff.
This packet does not mutate source files.
This packet does not promote any workpacket to current law.
